mechanics.excerpt: 1,000. 100,000 and OOO,00O denomi- nations The coins and blocks are pressed in Eold and contain chips and chemical compounds to prevent forgery: By the best available estimate_ the average exchange rate is Keren- sky C-bills The primary distinction between Clan and Inner Sphere eco nomic systems IS the motivating force behind them.
